hero_subtitle: SFTY connects transaction, wallet, and Travel Rule data into one secure supervisory layer to help regulators monitor risks and preserve evidence across digital asset flows.
trust_card_1_value: Market participants, licensing data and risk profiles
trust_card_2_value: Wallets, transactions and exposure across the market
trust_card_3_value: Originator and beneficiary data checked for completeness
trust_card_5_value: On-premise or private cloud for sensitive data
trust_card_6_value: Supervisory outputs, evidence and regulatory reports
problem_title: Supervision weakens when transaction data fragments
problem_description: Regulatory teams struggle to connect transaction records with complete Travel Rule and wallet risk information. This fragmentation slows case review, obscures risk context, and complicates evidence preservation for effective supervisory workflows.
problem_point_1_value: VASP activity, licensing data and risk signals remain scattered
problem_point_2_value: Alerts and investigations depend on disconnected manual processes
problem_point_3_value: Decisions are harder to explain without connected logs and case history
problem_point_4_value: Regulatory teams lack one shared operating layer for supervision
solution_description: SFTY integrates transaction records, Travel Rule information, wallet risk signals and regulatory data into a unified case management workflow for clear supervisory visibility and audit-ready evidence preservation.
workflow_title: From transaction signals to supervisory action
workflow_description: SFTY connects transaction data, Travel Rule messages and KYT signals to create alerts, open cases, preserve evidence and enable informed supervisory decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: Wallet, VASP, Travel Rule or OSINT signal appears
workflow_step_2_description: SFTY classifies and routes the signal for review
workflow_step_3_description: A supervisory case opens with context & evidence
workflow_step_4_description: Teams record a decision, request or supervisory response
workflow_step_5_description: Evidence, actions and outcomes stay available for review
why_sfty_title: Not another analytics tool. A supervisory control plane
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented transaction signals with licensing, wallets, Travel Rule data, cases and evidence to give regulators clear market and risk visibility.
why_sfty_card_1_description: See activity across VASPs, wallets, entities and risk signals
why_sfty_card_2_description: Connect participants, structures, links and supervisory records
why_sfty_card_3_description: Move from alerts to investigations, actions and reporting
why_sfty_card_4_description: Understand not only single risks, but the condition of the market
authority_description: SFTY supports government regulators with secure deployment, evidence-grade logging, access governance and procurement-safe architecture for comprehensive transaction visibility and oversight.
authority_card_1_description: Deploy on-premise, in private cloud or inside a controlled government environment
authority_card_2_description: Preserve activity, decisions, case history and reporting evidence
authority_card_3_description: Control who can view, review, escalate and act across teams and agencies
authority_card_4_description: Support phased implementation, documentation, integrations and governance review
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY improve regulatory visibility on digital transactions
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how Travel Rule messages link to wallet activity
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how evidence-grade logs support transaction monitoring audits
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe multi-provider data orchestration for supervisory workflows
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for supervisory, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on VASP supervision, sovereign deployment, evidence logging and regulatory workflows.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for digital asset regulators?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps regulators connect VASP, KYT, Travel Rule, licensing, and wallet data into one secure supervisory platform for connected market-level oversight and structured risk management.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY improve transaction visibility?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates transaction, wallet, and Travel Rule data streams, links originator and beneficiary information, and supports exception routing to enhance regulatory transaction visibility and risk detection.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve supervisory evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence-grade logs, case histories, decision records and supervisory actions, providing audit-ready materials to support reviews and reporting workflows workflows.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing government tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY supports modular integration, multi-provider orchestration and secure deployment options designed to connect with existing government registries, analytics and supervisory systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule or analytics tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY operates as an overlay that connects and structures outputs from Travel Rule, KYT and analytics providers without replacing them or existing regulatory tools.
final_title: Review transaction visibility and supervisory workflows
final_description: Explore how SFTY connects wallet, Travel Rule and transaction signals into structured supervisory cases and evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
